title: A New Dawn, The Obsessed, Peleliu, We Are Aliens, More Films to Play at Annecy
content: "Annecy Presents," one of the festival's non-competitive sections, will feature the following Japanese films: CHIMNEY TOWN: Frozen in Time ( Entotsu-chō no Poupelle ~Yakusoku no Tokeidai~ ) anime film , Paris ni Saku Étoile ( L'étoile de Paris en fleur or Étoile Blossoming in Paris) original anime film , The…
author: ANN

title: New Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- Anime Casts Jirō Saitō
content: The staff for Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- , the new anime of Tetsuo Hara 's landmark manga Fist of the North Star ( Hokuto no Ken ), announced on Wednesday that voice actor Jirō Saitō is joining the anime's cast as Mad Sarge, GOLAN's deputy leader.
author: ANN

title: Sword Art Online New Movie Information to Be Revealed in July 2026
content: Sword Art Online will reveal new information and details on its upcoming original anime movie in July 2026. The film was teased with the words “a completely new original theatrical edition is in production” back in January 2024, while its initial announcement came in November 2022.
author: Anime Corner

title: Gundam Creator Yoshiyuki Tomino, Manga Creator Machiko Satonaka Inducted Into Order of the Rising Sun
content: The Japanese government announced the 3,875 recipients of the Spring 2026 Conferment of Decorations on Wednesday, and inducted Mobile Suit Gundam creator Yoshiyuki Tomino and shōjo manga creator Machiko Satonaka into the Order of the Rising Sun, Gold Rays with Neck Ribbon class.
author: ANN

title: Unison Square Garden Enters Hiatus Following Drummer Takao Suzuki Departure
content: Japanese rock band Unison Square Garden announced on Monday that drummer Takao Suzuki will leave the band following their live performance titled Sentimental Period on July 15 at Makuhari Messe International Exhibition Hall in Chiba. Along with his departure, the band will also enter an indefinite hiatus.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 6 Years Later, Classic Anime Reboot Is Officially Coming to Netflix
content: As the exciting April 2026 draws near its end, Netflix is all set for its May calendar. The platform will be returning with another set of new releases and, most of all, the return of some of the biggest anime ever.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll Unveils New Streaming Update of 2025’s Biggest Isekai Ahead of Season 2
content: Based on the famous novel by Yuan Ye, better known as Cuttlefish That Loves Diving, Lord of Mysteries released its donghua (Chinese animated series) on June 28th, 2025. The stellar animation, soundtrack, and the unique worldbuilding quickly drew fans in, and the story has a long way to go.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll’s Best Original Anime of 2025 Unveils Disappointing Sequel Update
content: Crunchyroll is the largest streaming hub for anime fans worldwide, and its library includes hundreds of series. During each anime lineup, dozens of new series and sequels are added to the platform. Most of the successful shows already have a wide fanbase thanks to the popularity of their manga or light novel.
author: ComicBook

title: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth Switch 2, Xbox Series X|S Game's Trailer Reveals Demo
content: Square Enix revealed on Tuesday in a new trailer for the Nintendo Switch 2 and Xbox Series X|S releases of its Final Fantasy VII Rebirth sequel game that a demo has launched. Demo save data transfers to the full game. The game will launch for Switch 2, Xbox X|S and Xbox on PC on June 3.
author: ANN

title: 11 Years Later, Major Crunchyroll Drama Anime Prepares For Its Finale in September
content: One of the most beloved yet underrated anime series on Crunchyroll, Sound! Euphonium released its anime adaptation in April 2015. The series is based on a novel series written by Ayano Takeda and debuted in 2013.
author: ComicBook
